name: Datadog
description: Datadog — Performance Monitoring / APM tool for developers

seo.title: Datadog Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Datadog analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Performance Monitoring / APM.

lock_in.explanation: High — проприетарный агент, конвертирует OTel в свой формат, per-host pricing создаёт switching cost

when_to_use: Enterprise needing unified APM + logs + metrics
Need 700+ integrations out of the box
when_not_to_use: Cost-sensitive — Datadog bills add up FAST ($15/host + extras)
Want OpenTelemetry portability — Datadog converts to proprietary format
Startup with <10 services — Grafana Cloud free tier is enough

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: High — проприетарный агент, конвертирует OTel в свой формат, per-host pricing создаёт switching cost
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Plan 2-4 weeks minimum. Consider running parallel during migration
